title: Bug in Verilator signed/unsigned handling in power operator

features.name: power operator with negative unsigned base and negative exponent
features.description: Code should include a power operator (**) with a negative unsigned literal as base and a negative signed literal as exponent

features.name: power operator exponent self-determined sign
features.description: Code should include a power operator where the exponent operand uses a negative sized literal with explicit signed casting, testing self-determined context
